description: Synthetic production-like authority startup and rollback matrix for the Phase 06 release gate.

scenarios.description: No legacy stores, feature flag, or Composition repository exists.
A repository-verified canonical v2 document exists without legacy stores or a feature flag.
Current local generation and Scene stores are migrated under an explicit v2 activation request.
Current legacy stores and a matching committed v2 repository coexist.
An old backup is sanitized before startup and retired remote keys remain ignored.
An expired lock and staged document are cleaned before verified v2 activation.
Malformed repository JSON is retained and runtime authority fails closed to legacy.
One authority action rolls back to legacy without deleting v2 data and a verified forward activation restores v2.
